=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:28-5:34) TS377014: This generator returns an Effect-able value directly, which produces a nested `Effect<Effect<...>>`. If the intended result is the inner Effect value, `return yield*` represents that form. effect(returnEffectInGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable returnEffectInGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable returnEffectInGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add yield* statement"

[D2] (12:7-12:12) TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D3] (19:5-19:10) TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D4] (20:5-20:10) TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D5] (26:3-26:12) TS7027: Unreachable code detected.
  (no quick fixes)

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable returnEffectInGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable returnEffectInGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Add yield* statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
  if (Math.random() < 0.5) return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
  return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (n === 0) {
      yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
    }
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.interrupt
    yield* Effect.die("lol")
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
  throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
  return 42
})


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
  if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
  return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (n === 0) {
      return yield* Effect.fail("no zero!");
    }
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.interrupt
    yield* Effect.die("lol")
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
  throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
  return 42
})


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
  if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
  return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (n === 0) {
      yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
    }
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.interrupt;
    yield* Effect.die("lol")
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
  throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
  return 42
})


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
  if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
  return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (n === 0) {
      yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
    }
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.interrupt
    return yield* Effect.die("lol");
    return n / 1
  })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
  throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
  return 42
})
